title: FAA Technical Library
description: Need help to locate and research materials, project assistance, documents - Ask the Librarian Please feel free to contact William L. Combatti, Library Research Program Manager, (609) 485-8306 For comments regarding standards access or subscription services, please contact the Consensus Standards Management Branch.
text:
FAA subscriptions, available through membership agreements, include many, but not all, of the documents published by the standards development organizations.
Note: Use of these subscription services is limited to current FAA employees.
Accuris (Formally IHS) - Accuris provides access to a global index of one million industry standards and related documents written by over 450 different standards-developing organizations. Many of the documents in the global index are not included in our basic subscription. However, they are available by special order. See Accuris instructions below for more information. Accuris subscription does not include ARINC, ASTM, EUROCAE, RTCA and SAE documents. To access ARINC, ASTM, EUROCAE, RTCA and SAE documents individuals must use the specific icon for the corresponding organization.
Accuris Engineering Workbench includes:
Bibliographic records access to search existing consensus standards and specifications whether or not the documents are part of a FAA paid access subscription. Search results will provide full document titles including revision, supplement, addenda, errata indication, and cross referencing to superseded material, document number, number of document pages, publication date, indication of ANSI approval, DoD adoption, and new or revised since the previous update, abstracts (where available) and any additional information available.
A paid access subscription to frequently used consensus standards and specifications of which the FAA has paid for full access to and allows qualified users view, and in most cases, download and print the consensus standard.
Access to non-subscription standards. Purchase requests for standards not in the pre-paid access may be purchased on an individual basis pending availability of funding.
View a detailed list of Accuris document availability through the FAA subscription.
If you have identified an industry standard document that is not in the FAA Accuris subscription and you believe access to this document would be of value to FAA personnel, please take a minute to complete a Request for Accuris Document Subscription.
View Accuris Document Center instructions
ARINC - AEEC, AMC, and FSEMC are aviation industry activities organized by ARINC Industry Activities, an industry program of SAE Industry Technologies Consortia (ITC), to establish consensus technical standards, known globally as ARINC Standards. The FAA subscription includes electronic downloads to all ARINC standards made available through SAE Mobilus. View ARINC instructions
ASTM International - ASTM is an international Standards Development Organization (SDO) that develops and publishes voluntary consensus technical standards for a wide range of materials, products, systems, and services. The FAA subscription includes electronic downloads to all ASTM standards made available through ASTM Compass.
Battelle - Update 03/2025: COMING SOON! FAA employee access includes all versions of:
MMPDS, Metallic Materials Properties Development and Standardization: The primary source of statistically based design allowable properties for metallic materials and fasteners used in many different commercial and military aerospace applications around the world. Produced in partnership with government, industry and educational professionals experienced in the application and use of statistically based properties. Recognized by certifying agencies within their limitations: including FAA, DoD and NASA.
MIL-HDBK-5H, Military Handbook: Metallic Materials and Elements for Aerospace Vehicle Structures: This document contains design information on the strength properties of metallic materials and elements for aerospace vehicle structures.
ANC5, Army-Navy-Commerce Handbook 5: ANC5 was a document that provided properties for metallic materials and fasteners used in military and commercial weapon systems. Battelle Memorial Institute prepared the initial draft of the document's successor, MIL-HDBK-5, which was published in 1959. MIL-HDBK-5 was superseded by the MMPDS Handbook in 2003.
EUROCAE - The European Organization for Civil Aviation Equipment (EUROCAE) deals exclusively with aviation standardization, for both airborne and ground systems and equipment. EUROCAE works closely with other Standards Development Organizations (SDO) in joint development of standards and the subsequent reference of those standards by EASA and the FAA as Acceptable Means of Compliance. View EUROCAE instructions
RTCA - RTCA is an independent Standards Development Organization (SDO) that develops comprehensive, industry-vetted, and endorsed recommendations on technical performance standards and the operating environment for utilizing standards. These standards can be used as means of compliance with FAA regulations and other aviation regulatory authorities The FAA subscription includes electronic downloads to all RTCA standards. View RTCA instructions
SAE International - SAE is a standards development organization that develops and publishes voluntary consensus standards. Principal emphasis is placed on global transport industries such as aerospace, automotive, and commercial vehicles. The FAA subscription includes electronic downloads to SAE standards made available through SAE Mobilus. View SAE International instructions
General Research
Worldcat
WorldCat is the world's largest network of library content and services. WorldCat libraries are dedicated to providing access to their resources on the Web, where most people start their search for information
arXiv
Started in 1991, arxiv.org is a searchable electronic archive for research papers. Subjects covered include physics, mathematics and related disciplines
MDPI Open Access Journals
MDPI is one of the leading scholarly open access Publishers. It was founded by researchers in Basel, Switzerland in 1996. In 2010 MDPI AG was formally registered in Basel as a professional publishing house. The acronym stands for Multidisciplinary Digital Publishing Institute. Authors retain the copyright of their papers, and all papers are released under the Creative Commons by Attribution (CC-BY) license, thus allowing maximum dissemination and re-use of the research reported in our journals. As of early 2016 we receive more than 2.300 manuscript submissions and publish slightly more than 1.400 papers per month.
Ebsco Open Dissertations
The program is free for authors and participating institutions with the desired end of making significant open-access content more readily discoverable to end-users within and beyond academic institutions.
CiteSeerX
CiteSeerX is a scientific literature digital library that focuses on computer and information science.
DART Europe E-Theses Portal
The Digital Archive of Research Theses is a free web portal that provides access to dissertations and theses from European universities.
Scholarly Societies
DTIC
Access to technical reports from the Defense Technical Information Center
Directory of Open Access Journals
Free full text quality controlled scientific and scholarly journals covering all subjects
Hindawi Published Open Access Journals
Hindawi publishes 438 peer reviewed open access journals covering all areas of science, technology and medicine
SpringerOpen Journals
Launched in June 2010, the SpringerOpen journal portfolio covers all areas of science, technology, medicine, the humanities and social sciences
Advances in Cognitive Psychology
An open access journal devoted primarily to the scientific study of perception, language processing, attention, memory and cognition. Published by the University of Finance and Management in Warsaw
Advanced Science
Advanced Science is an interdisciplinary premium open access journal covering fundamental and applied research in materials science, physics and chemistry, medical and life sciences, as well as engineering. Advanced Science publishes cutting-edge research, selected through a strict and fair reviewing process and presented using highest quality production standards to create a premium open access journal. Top science enjoying maximum accessibility is the aim of this vibrant and innovative research publication platform.
OpenDOAR
OpenDOAR is an authoritative directory of academic open access repositories. OpenDOAR is primarily a service to enhance and support the academic and research activities of the global community. OpenDOAR maintains a comprehensive and authoritative list of institutional and subject-based repositories. It also encompasses archives supported by funding agencies like the National Institutes for Health in the USA or the Welcome Trust in the UK and Europe.
British Library Electronic Theses Service
Search over 350,000 doctoral theses from UK Universities
FAA Sponsored Research
Research, Development and Technology Research Hub
Office of the Assistant Secretary for Research and Technology of the Department of Transportation Research database
Research Data Managment Plans
Data Managment Plans issued as part of the Open Data Initiative and added to the FAA Technical Library Public Catalog. A direct link to DMP entries is provied in the cataog page left menu.
Professional Organizations
American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics (AIAA)
Flight Safety Foundation
International Civil Aviation Organization
RTCA
Human Factors and Ergonomics Society
Transportation Research Board
Institute of Physics
J-Stage Japan Science and Technology Information
Industry Organizations
Airlines for America (A4A)
American Association of Airport Executives (AEEE)
International Air Transport Association (IATA)
Use of these subscription services is limited to current FAA employees and approved support contractor personnel.
Contact the FAA Technical Library for access credentials.
Subscription database search now available through Google Scholar
Aviation Week & Space Technology
FAA employee access to the Aviation Week Intelligence Network which includes Aviation Week, Aviation Daily and sister publications.
EBook Central™
The Ebook service from Proquest includes access to ebooks on computer science, engineering and related subjects
IET ebook collection
IET (Institution of Engineering and Technology) ebooks published since 2010
eJournal Service
EbscoHost service includes abstracts and full text of articles from scholarly, peer reviewed periodical titles in the engineering, physical and social sciences and includes STM Source, Applied Science & Technology Source, Engineering Source and Computers & Applied Sciences Complete
Royal Aeronautical Society
Access to the Society's publications
IEEE Xplore
Access IEEE journals, and conference proceedings.
AIAA Meeting Papers
Access to AIAA Meeting Papers
SciTech Premium Collection from ProQuest
Collection of full text scholarly articles in Natural Sciences and Technology
PsychARTICLES
Access to American Psychological Association (APA) journal collection
IET Video Collection
IET.tv is one of the world's largest collated resources of authoritative and multidisciplinary engineering and technology content. Comprising 6,500 presentation, lecture and training videos.
Search Using FAA Technical Library Portal
Proquest Serials Solutions Portal to all library eResources.
Citation Linker
Article citation linker to full text from Proquest Serials Solutions
